chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 400 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 30.11.2022 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the petitioner. Through instant petition, the petitioner, inter alia, seeks removal of encroachments in front of his shop near Qasim Market, Shikarpur Road, Sukkur. In response, comments have been filed by respondent No.6 (Mukthiarkar/City Survey Officer, Sukkur), which reflect that Anti- Encroachment Team of Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur and respondent No.6 have removed the requisite encroachments and vacated the street for smooth running of general public. The photographs are annexed with the comments of respondent No.6, which apparently shows that there is no encroachment at the side of road/Qasim Market; hence, this petition has apparently served its purpose, therefore, the same stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
